description_long: This object is a compact, modern fax machine with a rectangular body and a hinged lid that opens upward to reveal a flatbed scanning surface. The exterior is predominantly black with a glossy finish, and the control panel is located on the top left side, featuring several buttons and indicator lights. The front of the machine has a paper output slot and a pull-out paper tray, which extends forward to catch printed or faxed documents. The lid has a small, square, glossy accent in the center, and the overall design is streamlined with rounded corners. No numeric keypad or telephone handset is visible, suggesting a simplified interface. The machine appears suitable for placement on a desk or counter in an office or urban environment.
description: A sleek, black fax machine with a hinged lid, flatbed scanner, and a front-facing paper tray and output slot. The control panel features several buttons and indicator lights on the top left.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, flatbed scanner, control panel on the left, and extended paper tray below the output slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open lid, the control panel's position, and the depth of the paper tray.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the closed lid with a central accent, and the overall rectangular shape of the machine.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open lid, the side profile of the control panel, and the extended paper tray.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the top left side of the machine, featuring a cluster of buttons and indicator lights arranged in a compact group. The buttons are positioned in a vertical and horizontal alignment, with indicator lights adjacent to them. No display screen or numeric keypad is visible.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is a pull-out design located at the front bottom of the machine, extending forward to catch output. It appears to be a single-piece tray with a circular cutout and no visible adjustable guides.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is positioned at the front center of the machine, directly above the extended paper tray, allowing printed or faxed documents to emerge and rest on the tray.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visible or attached to the machine in any of the views.
